objective: Review the supplied diff and report any correctness or security issues.

inputs.text:
--- a/auth.py
+++ b/auth.py
@@ -1,6 +1,8 @@
-def check(token):
-    return token == SECRET
+import hmac
+def check(token):
+    # constant-time compare to avoid a timing side channel
+    return hmac.compare_digest(token, SECRET)
